engine.ladder_reasoning: No defined expertise sold and nothing to trust-hire (free content, monetized via ads/affiliate), so not trust. The published articles ARE the proof and the whole site is a browse-the-content experience, which is closest to 'work' (portfolio-as-proof). But the site's actual job is a content portal with blog inventory, not one conversion action — hence in_icp false.

goal.one_action: browse/read blog articles; secondary — subscribe email to the blog

structure.archetype_note: WordPress/Elementor personal blog: content-hub homepage (carousels, article grids, category lists) + About + affiliate 'Top Products' + mailto Contact + ~200-post blog. Not a landing page.

mapped.observed_as: Launch Your Business, Improve Profits and Create Wealth (site title/masthead)
Hi. I'm Jeff Wiener / The Story / About

unmapped.observed: Trending in the Digital World (article carousel)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Blog-article feed/carousel is a content-index surface; no canonical section represents a dynamic post feed

unmapped.observed: Featured Recent Articles / Popular Posts / Recent Posts (blog post grids)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Repeated blog-post index grids are core content inventory, not a landing-page section

unmapped.observed: Categories (17 content categories with post counts)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Taxonomy/category navigation for a blog archive; no canonical id for content taxonomy nav

unmapped.observed: Top Products (affiliate book list + SEM Rush referral)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Affiliate recommendation list is a monetization surface, not features/pricing/products of the site's own offer
No contact form; advertising/guest-post inquiry text only — closest is a CTA but it's an editorial mailto, not conversion

proposed_new.name: content-feed
proposed_new.evidence: Homepage is built from repeated dynamic blog-post grids/carousels (Trending, Featured Recent Articles, Popular Posts, Recent Posts) — a post-index/feed surface that 'blog' (authoring) and 'catalog' (product listing) don't capture.

proposed_new.name: affiliate-list
proposed_new.evidence: 'Top Products' page is a curated affiliate/referral recommendation list (Amazon books, SEM Rush) — a monetization pattern with no capability or engine representation.

design_style.none_fits_because: Photo-heavy content/magazine layout; editorial/craft is the closest, though it leans generic-WordPress-blog rather than crafted.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full (4 pages captured); structure/nav/CTAs unambiguous. Slightly lower certainty only on exact section-heading wording (WebFetch-derived), but classification (out-of-ICP content blog) is clear.

gap_findings: Site is fundamentally a content portal (blog inventory + affiliate monetization + ad 'Advertise' nav), not a one-conversion landing page — falls outside ICP; the 5 copy engines do not model a content-hub whose 'conversion' is content consumption.
Proposed new capability 'content-feed' — dynamic blog-post index grids/carousels are the homepage's dominant surface and have no canonical section id (mapped to miscellaneous 4x).
Proposed new capability 'affiliate-list' — curated affiliate/referral recommendation page is an unmodeled monetization pattern.
Category/taxonomy navigation with post counts has no canonical section representation.
